# HOTEL SHUFFLE / REFRAIN

This site compares two hotels near Ikebukuro Station C1 Exit in Tokyo: HOTEL SHUFFLE and HOTEL REFRAIN.

## Primary page

- https://shuffle-refrain.com/hotel-integrated-3x3
- https://shuffle-refrain.com/shuffle
- https://shuffle-refrain.com/refrain
- https://shuffle-refrain.com/price
- https://shuffle-refrain.com/access

## What the page contains

- Hotel comparison for HOTEL SHUFFLE and HOTEL REFRAIN.
- Price guide for REST and STAY use.
- Google Map embeds and map links for both hotels.
- Room photos and stay-scene photos.
- Booking links for each hotel.
- FAQ content for reservation flow, access, and choosing between the hotels.

## Quick facts

- HOTEL SHUFFLE: refined, calm stay near Ikebukuro Station C1 Exit.
- HOTEL REFRAIN: casual, bright stay near Ikebukuro Station C1 Exit.
- HOTEL SHUFFLE address: 2-16-4 Ikebukuro, Toshima-ku, Tokyo 171-0014, Japan.
- HOTEL REFRAIN address: 2-16-5 Ikebukuro, Toshima-ku, Tokyo 171-0014, Japan.
- HOTEL SHUFFLE phone: 03-3982-8071.
- HOTEL REFRAIN phone: 03-5950-2717.

- /pricing.md
